creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Build failure in poudriere (Host: CURRENT, poudriere jail: 13-STABLE, see below)

On all builders the port net/xrdp fails with the following error, even after rebuilding pulseaudio and dependencies and the pulseaudio-xrdp-mod port.


[...]
The audio/freedesktop-sound-theme is needed if the default sound files
are uncommented in the /usr/local/etc/pulse/default.pa file.
===>   xrdp-0.9.22.1_2,1 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/pulse-14.2/modules/module-xrdp-sink.so - not found
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/net/xrdp
=>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for xrdp-0.9.22.1_2,1
build of net/xrdp | xrdp-0.9.22.1_2,1 ended at Mon Aug 14 14:00:35 UTC 2023
build time: 00:06:32
!!! build failure encountered !!!


[...]
